description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On October 22, 2025 at 8:53 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Mountain View, California was in a 
collision involving a pickup truck on W. Middlefield Road at N. Shoreline Boulevard.  
 
The Waymo AV was stopped facing southeast in the rightmost lane on W. Middlefield Road in a queue of traffic for a red light at the 
intersection at Shoreline Boulevard. After the traffic light turned green, the Waymo AV proceeded a short distance forward before coming 
to a stop to yield to the stationary SUV directly in front of the Waymo AV. As the Waymo AV came to a stop, a pickup truck that was 
initially stopped directly behind the Waymo AV began to proceed forward. The Waymo AV then began to proceed forward again after the 
SUV ahead proceeded forward, and the front of the pickup truck then made contact with the rear of the Waymo AV.  At the time of the 
impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
